title: krameria cistoidea
intro: Krameria cistoidea, also known as Rhatany, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Krameria cistoidea include its potential to treat gum inflammation and mouth ulcers, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. Krameria cistoidea is often prepared as a powder, tincture, or tea, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
